description_long: This public toilet structure is a compact, rectangular building with a flat concrete roof and a brick facade on the front. The front features two entryways, each with a pair of circular windows above the doors, and a paved entry platform. The sides and rear are plain, with smooth concrete walls, while the roof is partially open, revealing internal partitions and pink-tinted cubicle dividers. There are a few small trees or shrubs adjacent to the building, providing some greenery. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A small, rectangular public toilet building with a brick front, flat concrete roof, and visible internal cubicles. The structure is surrounded by a paved area and some greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing two entryways with circular windows, brick facade, and a paved entry platform.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain concrete wall and a tree positioned nearby.
description_view_2: Rear view with two trees in front of a featureless concrete wall and a glimpse of the open roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain concrete wall and a tree on the left, plus the paved area extending outward.
attribute_ventilation_features: open roof sections, circular windows above doors
attribute_roof_structure: Flat concrete roof with partial open sections and no visible overhangs or skylights.
